name: budget-manual-empty-plan
purpose: Semantic corner case: the empty plan is available and consumes no budget.

name: budget-manual-vacuous-precondition
purpose: Semantic corner case: the precondition is false everywhere, so the budget condition is vacuous.

name: budget-manual-within-budget
purpose: A two-step plan reaches the goal and exactly fits the available budget.

name: budget-manual-over-budget
purpose: The same two-step plan is available and reaches the goal, but it exceeds the budget.

name: budget-manual-unaware-cheap-action
purpose: A cheap safe action exists in the LTS, but the agent's only available class uses an expensive action.

name: budget-vector-manual-within-budget
purpose: Vector-budget corner case: the plan fits both resource dimensions.

name: budget-vector-manual-first-dim-failure
purpose: Vector-budget corner case: the plan violates the first resource dimension.

name: budget-vector-manual-second-dim-failure
purpose: Vector-budget corner case: the plan violates the second resource dimension.

name: budget-delivery-cheap-route-positive
purpose: Delivery case study: a cheap route reaches the destination within the available budget.

name: budget-delivery-expensive-only-negative
purpose: Delivery case study: the destination is reachable, but the agent is only aware of an over-budget route.

name: budget-robot-time-energy-positive
purpose: Robot case study: the route fits both time and energy budgets.

name: budget-robot-time-energy-negative
purpose: Robot case study: the route is reachable but exceeds the energy budget.

name: budget-rescue-time-energy-positive
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the rescue plan reaches the survivor and fits both the time and energy budgets.

name: budget-rescue-oxygen-negative
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the rescue route is reachable, but it exceeds the second resource dimension, interpreted as energy or oxygen.

name: budget-line-positive-16
purpose: 1D budget line baseline: budget exactly matches the path cost.

name: budget-line-positive-24
purpose: 1D budget line baseline: budget exactly matches the path cost.

name: budget-line-positive-32

name: budget-line-over-budget-32
purpose: 1D budget line negative baseline: the goal is reachable, but the budget is one unit too small.
